name: Karen Mok
description:
'''Karen Joy Morris''' ({{zh|c=莫文蔚|p=Mò Wénwèi|j=Mok6 Man4wai3}}; born 2 June 1970), better known as '''Karen Mok''', is a Hong Kong actress and singer. She is considered one of the leading East Asian pop singers and actresses with a career spanning three decades. Mok is the first female Hong Kong singer to win the [[Golden Melody Award]], and to date has won it three times. 

Mok has released 18 solo studio albums, starred in over 50 movies, and has over 15 million followers on leading Chinese social media site [[Sina Weibo|Weibo]]. The Lhasa concert during [[The Ultimate Karen Mok Show]] (2018–2021) set the [[Guinness World Records|Guinness World Record]] for the Highest Altitude Mass-Attended Music Concert. In 2024, Mok was the first female singer to do a solo concert in [[Beijing National Stadium]], the Bird's Nest.
